summary: Compete Mechanics, Animated Social Proof, ForceShareGate, K-Factor Admin Dashboard, and Email Nudges Testing Complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed: (1) TrendingCompete component gracefully hidden when has_data=false (truth-based), (2) AnimatedViewerCount shows real viewer count or hidden when no viewers, (3) PublicCreation page has social proof banner with '59 people continued this story', urgency badge 'Trending now' after 4s, share buttons (WA/X/IG/Link), mid-page hook, story hook cliffhanger, (4) Admin K-Factor tab shows viral coefficient 0.0538, viral funnel with real data, top performing content, (5) Email Nudge System shows 'Resend Active' badge confirming RESEND_API_KEY is configured, (6) ForceShareGate integrated in StoryVideoPipeline PostGenPhase.
critical_code_review_comments: compete_routes.py GET /api/compete/trending returns truth-based data with has_data boolean - no synthetic data
compete_routes.py GET /api/compete/live-viewers returns real session count from user_sessions and growth_events
retention_routes.py POST /api/retention/test-email is admin-only and sends via Resend
retention_routes.py GET /api/retention/admin/email-nudges shows email_service_active=true when RESEND_API_KEY is set
email_service.py is_email_enabled() checks RESEND_API_KEY environment variable
TrendingCompete.js gracefully returns null when has_data=false (line 24)
ForceShareGate.js integrated in StoryVideoPipeline.js PostGenPhase at line 1060
ForceShareGate shows after 2 seconds when uiState='READY' (lines 1040-1051)
AdminDashboard.js K-Factor section at lines 473-549 with EmailNudgeStatus widget
EmailNudgeStatus widget at lines 158-199 shows Resend Active/Inactive status
PublicCreation.js has AnimatedViewerCount in social proof banner at line 275
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compete Mechanics + K-Factor Admin + Email Nudges verified: (1) GET /api/compete/trending returns truth-based data with has_data boolean, top_story_today, most_continued, fastest_character, rising_stories. (2) GET /api/compete/live-viewers returns real session count with viewers integer and show boolean. (3) POST /api/retention/test-email is admin-only, sends via Resend (sandbox mode - only krajapraveen@gmail.com). (4) GET /api/retention/admin/email-nudges shows email_service_active=true, pending_count, sent_count. (5) GET /api/growth/viral-coefficient returns viral_coefficient_K, components, interpretation. (6) TrendingCompete component gracefully hidden when no trending data (has_data=false). (7) AnimatedViewerCount hidden when no active viewers (show=false). (8) ForceShareGate shows in PostGenPhase after 2 seconds when video is ready. (9) Admin K-Factor tab shows viral coefficient, viral funnel, top performing content, email nudge status. (10) Email Nudge System shows 'Resend Active' badge. (11) PublicCreation page has social proof banner, urgency badge, share buttons, mid-page hook, story hook.

GET_compete_trending.details: Returns success:true, has_data boolean, top_story_today, most_continued, fastest_character, rising_stories

GET_compete_live_viewers.details: Returns success:true, viewers integer (real count), show boolean, label string

POST_retention_test_email.details: Admin-only endpoint, sends test nudge email via Resend

GET_growth_viral_coefficient.details: Returns viral_coefficient_K, components (total_shares, page_views, signups_from_shares), interpretation

TrendingCompete_Dashboard.details: Gracefully hidden when has_data=false (truth-based, no fake data)

AnimatedViewerCount_PublicCreation.details: Integrated in social proof banner, hidden when no viewers

ForceShareGate_PostGen.details: Shows after 2 seconds when video is ready, has share buttons and continue CTA

Admin_KFactor_Tab.details: Shows viral coefficient 0.0538, viral funnel, top performing content

EmailNudgeStatus_Widget.details: Shows 'Resend Active' badge, Emails Sent: 0, Pending: 0

PublicCreation_SocialProof.details: Shows '59 people continued this story - Be the next to decide what happens'

PublicCreation_ShareButtons.details: 4 buttons: WA, X, IG, Link with +5/+15/+25 reward tiers

PublicCreation_MidPageHook.details: 'This story has no ending...' with Continue It Yourself button

PublicCreation_StoryHook.details: 'Where the story left off...' with cliffhanger text

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real data. Email sending via Resend is ACTIVE (RESEND_API_KEY is set). Resend is in sandbox mode - can only send to krajapraveen@gmail.com.
